backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor for the YMW backend, implementing user profiles, customer account signup/login, and service request management with role-based access control and blob storage mixins.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping navigation-related feature IDs (removing Social Media link, removing standalone Login link, adding Sign Up dropdown CTA) to their affected files, components, and test requirement IDs.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing one-to-two sentence summaries of each frontend source file, serving as a reference index for the frontend codebase structure and component responsibilities.
frontend/index.css: Base Tailwind CSS file defining OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for light and dark theme color tokens (background, foreground, primary, chart colors, sidebar, etc.).
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point with full SEO metadata (Open Graph, Twitter Card, JSON-LD LocalBusiness schema), canonical URL, and preload hints for critical assets for the YMW Compliance Services site.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React app component that sets up TanStack Router with 17 lazy-loaded routes, a Layout wrapper with Navigation/Footer/FloatingCTA/ConsultationPopup, and a React Query client with default options.
frontend/src/components/Card.tsx: Simple reusable card component that applies the `civic-card` class with optional hover cursor styling and supports className overrides via `cn`.
frontend/src/components/ConsultationPopu: A timed modal popup (shown after 5 seconds, once per session) that collects user info and service interest to submit a free consultation request, displaying a success state after submission.
frontend/src/components/FloatingCTA.tsx: A fixed floating action button group in the bottom-right corner providing WhatsApp chat and phone call links with hover label tooltips.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Site footer with brand info, quick navigation links, support links, legal/policy links, and contact details organized in a responsive multi-column grid.
frontend/src/components/FreeConsultation: A full-page section with an inline consultation request form that collects name, phone, service, and city, showing a success confirmation with reference ID after submission.
A simple full-screen loading spinner component used as a fallback during lazy-loaded route or component transitions.
frontend/src/components/Navigation.tsx: Sticky top navigation bar with logo, desktop nav links, phone number, auth-aware account/sign-up dropdown, and a responsive mobile menu.
frontend/src/components/ProfileSetupModa: A non-dismissible dialog modal that prompts new users to enter their name and email to complete their profile, submitting via the useSaveUserProfile mutation.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor using React Query, supporting both anonymous and authenticated (Internet Identity) usage, and invalidates dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useCustomerSession.ts: Provides utilities to get, set, and clear a customer session stored in sessionStorage, exposing session data including customerId, name, email, and business info.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Implements an Internet Identity authentication context and provider using DFINITY's AuthClient, exposing login/logout functions, identity state, and login status to child components.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Centralizes React Query hooks for all backend interactions including user profiles, blog posts, contact messages, grievances, consultation requests, and customer/service-request operations.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that imports Google Fonts, configures Tailwind CSS with a dark navy/gold design token theme, and defines reusable component utility classes.
frontend/src/lib/utils.ts: Utility module providing a Tailwind class merging helper (`cn`) and two timestamp formatting functions that convert nanosecond bigint values to human-readable date strings.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app with React Query and Internet Identity providers wrapping the root App component.
frontend/src/pages/About.tsx: About page component displaying company stats, core values, team members, and a free consultation CTA section for YMW Compliance Services.
frontend/src/pages/AdminPanel.tsx: Password-protected admin panel that displays filterable tables of all customers and service requests fetched via React Query hooks. Uses session storage to persist admin authentication state.
frontend/src/pages/Blog.tsx: Blog listing page that fetches and displays blog posts with expand/collapse functionality, loading skeletons, and an empty/error state. Includes a hero section and a free consultation CTA at the bottom.
frontend/src/pages/ConfidentialityPolicy: Static page rendering YMW Compliance Services' confidentiality policy as a series of predefined sections with a hero header and a free consultation section at the bottom.
frontend/src/pages/Contact.tsx: Contact page with company info cards (phone, email, address, hours) and a form that submits messages via a React Query mutation, showing a success state with a reference ID on completion.
frontend/src/pages/CustomerDashboard.tsx: Authenticated customer dashboard that lets logged-in users submit service requests from a predefined list, view their past requests, and access WhatsApp/email document upload shortcuts. Redirects to login if no session exists.
frontend/src/pages/CustomerLogin.tsx: Renders the customer login page for YMW Compliance Services with an email/password form, password visibility toggle, error handling, and session storage on successful authentication before redirecting to the customer dashboard.
frontend/src/pages/CustomerSignup.tsx: Renders the customer registration page with a form collecting full name, mobile number, email, business name, and password, validates inputs, calls the signup mutation, and redirects to the login page on success.
frontend/src/pages/Disclaimer.tsx: Displays a static disclaimer page for YMW Compliance Services with eight predefined sections covering general disclaimers, legal advice limitations, liability, and contact information.
frontend/src/pages/Grievance.tsx: Renders a grievance submission page with a categorized form (cleanliness, noise, safety, etc.), submits data via a mutation hook, and displays a reference number upon successful submission.
frontend/src/pages/Home.tsx: Renders the main landing page featuring a hero section, 15 featured services grid, company stats, strengths, and a free consultation request form with UTM source tracking.
frontend/src/pages/PrivacyPolicy.tsx: Renders the Privacy Policy page for YMW Compliance Services LLP, displaying eight policy sections (data collection, usage, security, third-party sharing, user rights, cookies, changes, and contact) along with a hero header and a FreeConsultationSection.
frontend/src/pages/RefundPolicy.tsx: Renders the Refund Policy page for YMW Compliance Services LLP, covering eligibility, non-refundable items, request process, timelines, partial refunds, and cancellation policy in a styled dark-themed layout with a FreeConsultationSection.
frontend/src/pages/Services.tsx: Displays a grid of all compliance service offerings (e.g., Business Registration, GST, ISO, Trademark, FSSAI) with icons, badges, descriptions, and feature lists, plus a FreeConsultationSection and links via TanStack Router.
frontend/src/pages/Signup.tsx: Handles Internet Identity authentication, auto-registering new users on first login, showing a profile card for authenticated users or a sign-in button for guests, and conditionally rendering a ProfileSetupModal when no profile exists.
frontend/src/pages/SocialMedia.tsx: Renders a page listing YMW Compliance's social media profiles (Twitter, Facebook, Instagram, LinkedIn, YouTube, GitHub) as clickable cards with platform icons, follower counts, and descriptions, followed by a FreeConsultationSection.
frontend/src/pages/TermsAndConditions.ts: React page displaying YMW Compliance Services LLP's Terms & Conditions with 9 sections (acceptance, use, IP, fees, liability, warranties, governing law, amendments, contact) rendered in a dark navy layout with a hero header and a free consultation section at the bottom.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility module providing functions to extract URL parameters from both regular query strings and hash-based routing, persist them in sessionStorage, and clean sensitive params from the URL hash without page reload.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the default theme with custom navy/gold color palettes, Inter/Poppins fonts, oklch-based semantic color tokens, custom box shadows, and plugins for animations, typography, and container queries.
project_state.json: Project state snapshot (version 27) describing the multi-page React website for YMW Compliance Services LLP, listing all existing features, architectural notes, color scheme, known issues, and the full set of implemented pages including auth, dashboard, and admin panel.
